name: Angola Gambrel Garage Plan - 12x24 Barn-Style Garage with Loft Potential | DIY PDF Building Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a high-capacity roof profile that increases interior volume and allows for optional loft storage.
The 12x24 layout offers ample room for a vehicle, lawn equipment, motorcycles, workshop tools, or organized storage.
The gambrel roof design naturally creates overhead space ideal for a storage loft, seasonal gear, or workshop shelving.
Simple framing methods and efficient dimensions make Angola an approachable build for both beginner and experienced DIY builders.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Angola Gambrel Garage - a versatile 12x24 barn-style garage and storage solution designed for efficiency, durability, and timeless curb appeal. Featuring the classic gambrel roof profile, this design maximizes interior headroom while delivering the charming look of a traditional barn. With its balanced proportions, practical footprint, and DIY-friendly structure, the Angola garage blends smart functionality with attractive architectural character....
